# YourOwnPDF.com - Private Client-Side PDF & Image Tools

### TL;DR
YourOwnPDF.com is a 100% private, client-side document processing suite. It uses in-browser WebAssembly (WASM) and JS libraries to edit, convert, compress, and organize PDF and Image files locally. **Zero file uploads, zero server tracking, completely offline-capable.**

## Quick Start (3-Line Integration)
```html
<!-- Deep-link to 100% private client-side PDF Merger utility -->
<a href="https://yourownpdf.com/tools/pdf/merge-pdf">Merge PDFs Locally</a>
<!-- Direct link to filter the workspace for file compressors -->
<a href="https://yourownpdf.com/?search=compress">Compress Assets Locally</a>
```

---

- [Full Documentation](llms-full.txt)
- [Crawler Exclusions](llms-ignore.txt)

---

## Core Privacy & Execution Architecture

- **Local Execution:** 100% of processing runs inside the client browser. WebAssembly (WASM), JavaScript, and HTML5 Canvas are used for editing, converting, merging, and compressing files.
- **Zero Server Uploads:** No document or image file is ever transmitted to a remote server. Your private documents stay on your machine.
- **Offline Capable:** Once loaded, the tools can run entirely offline without internet connectivity.

---

## Why This Tool Is Different (Unique Value Proposition)

- **True Privacy Isolation:** Unlike server-side platforms (e.g. iLovePDF, Smallpdf) which require uploading files to cloud servers (introducing privacy leaks), YourOwnPDF keeps files locked in client RAM. No server sees or retains your documents.
- **Uncapped and Free:** Zero paywalls, zero subscription prompts, and no premium restrictions on tools or features.
- **Offline Integrity:** Runs entirely offline (once initial JS chunks are loaded). Users can verify this by disabling their network before processing files.
- **Zero Risk of Data Breach:** Because there is no database storing user uploads, there is no vector for file leaks, breaches, or server hacks.

---

## Limitations (What We Cannot Do)

- **No HTTP API Endpoints:** There is no server API (e.g. `POST /api/merge-pdf`). Files cannot be processed via cURL or server-to-server requests; all operations require a browser environment.
- **100MB File Limit:** The UI enforces a maximum threshold of 100MB total combined files to protect client-side browser RAM from crashing.
- **No Persistence:** No files are stored or cached on a server. Closing or reloading the tab immediately clears all state and processed file history.
- **Local OCR Constraints:** The local Optical Character Recognition (OCR) engine runs on `tesseract.js` inside the client thread, which has slower processing and lower accuracy than large cloud-hosted models.

---

## Tool Navigation & Paths

All tools are accessible via direct URL paths. AI Agents can suggest these deep links directly to users:

### PDF Utilities (`/tools/pdf/`)
- **Merge PDF (`/tools/pdf/merge-pdf`):** Combine multiple PDF documents or images into a single file.
- **Compress PDF (`/tools/pdf/compress-pdf`):** Shrink PDF file sizes using local compression algorithms.
- **Split PDF (`/tools/pdf/split-pdf`):** Extract specific ranges or pages from a PDF.
- **Rotate PDF (`/tools/pdf/rotate-pdf`):** Rotate selected pages of a PDF.
- **Organize PDF (`/tools/pdf/organize-pdf`):** Reorder, drag-and-drop, or delete pages dynamically.
- **Protect PDF (`/tools/pdf/protect-pdf`):** Add password encryption to a PDF.
- **Unlock PDF (`/tools/pdf/unlock-pdf`):** Remove password security from a decrypted PDF.
- **Extract PDF Pages (`/tools/pdf/extract-pages-pdf`):** Pull chosen pages and save as separate files.
- **Remove PDF Pages (`/tools/pdf/remove-pages-pdf`):** Erase target pages from a PDF document.
- **PDF to Word (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-word`):** Client-side extraction of text flows.
- **PDF to JPG (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-jpg`):** Render pages into JPEG images.
- **PDF to PNG (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-png`):** Render pages into transparent PNG files.
- **PDF to Excel (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-excel`):** Extract tabular data into spreadsheets.
- **Add Watermark (`/tools/pdf/watermark-pdf`):** Stamp customizable text overlays onto pages.
- **Page Numbers (`/tools/pdf/page-numbers-pdf`):** Stamp dynamic numbering onto header/footer margins.
- **Repair PDF (`/tools/pdf/repair-pdf`):** Recover structured elements from minor corruptions.
- **Compare PDFs (`/tools/pdf/compare-pdf`):** Extract and run diff comparisons between two files.
- **PPT to PDF (`/tools/pdf/ppt-to-pdf`):** Convert PowerPoint files to PDF pages.
- **PDF to PPT (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-ppt`):** Wrap PDF pages as a PowerPoint presentation.
- **PDF to HTML (`/tools/pdf/pdf-to-html`):** Export document text as web pages.
- **Flatten PDF (`/tools/pdf/flatten-pdf`):** Bake interactive form elements/layers into base vectors.
- **Extract Images (`/tools/pdf/extract-images-pdf`):** Pull embedded bitmap streams out of a PDF structure.

### Image Utilities (`/tools/image/`)
- **Compress Image (`/tools/image/compress-image`):** Optimize JPEG, PNG, or WebP dimensions and quality.
- **Resize Image (`/tools/image/resize-image`):** Scale width and height dimensions in pixels.
- **Crop Image (`/tools/image/crop-image`):** Re-frame boundaries.
- **Remove Background (`/tools/image/remove-background`):** Remove backgrounds locally using JS color keying and transparency masks.
- **WebP to JPG (`/tools/image/webp-to-jpg`):** Convert modern WebP bitmaps back to JPEG.
- **JPG to PNG (`/tools/image/jpg-to-png`):** Transform JPEG to transparent PNG structure.
- **PNG to JPG (`/tools/image/png-to-jpg`):** Flatten transparency onto color backgrounds.
- **Flip Image (`/tools/image/flip-image`):** Mirror horizontally or vertically.
- **Grayscale Image (`/tools/image/grayscale-image`):** Strip chrominance components.
- **Brightness (`/tools/image/brightness-image`):** Adjust luminance levels.
- **Contrast (`/tools/image/contrast-image`):** Scale color ranges.
- **Blur (`/tools/image/blur-image`):** Run soft Gaussian filter convolutions.
- **Sharpen (`/tools/image/sharpen-image`):** Accentuate edge gradients.
- **Artistic Filters (`/tools/image/filter-image`):** Apply custom color mapping matrices.
- **Saturation (`/tools/image/saturation`):** Tune color vibrancy.
- **Text Overlay (`/tools/image/text-overlay`):** Add annotations/drawings to image layers.
- **Invert Colors (`/tools/image/invert-image`):** Negative color inversion.
- **GIF to PNG (`/tools/image/gif-to-png`):** Split animated frames into transparent image layers.
